brand.name: Tennis Pro Analysis
brand.positioning: Premium sports-performance brand, data-driven coaching, match analysis

rules: Use #B7FF00 (Lime) strictly for high-priority CTA buttons, active states, and data highlights.
Use #1FA463 (Tennis Green) for secondary elements, success states, or subtle grid borders.
Surfaces (#0B1F33) should sit on Background (#06141F) with a 1px solid border (#F8FAFC with 10% opacity) rather than heavy drop shadows (Tactical Minimalism).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-8, p-12, py-24 for massive sections
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Tetris Grid for marketing sections (asymmetrical spans). Control Room Grid for 'Baseline Vision' analytics sections (dense, strict columns).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Keep edges sharp to emphasize tactical/athletic feel.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and data. Center-align hero headlines.

hero.layout: Full viewport height. Background image with bg-[#06141F]/60 overlay. Content left-aligned or centered.
hero.headline: "Tennis Pro Analysis"
hero.subheadline: "Performance & Video Analysis for serious tennis players, clubs and competitive players."
hero.cta_primary: bg-[#B7FF00] text-[#06141F] font-bold hover:bg-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 text-lg
hero.cta_secondary: border border-[#F8FAFC]/20 text-[#F8FAFC] hover:border-[#1FA463] hover:text-[#1FA463] transition-colors bg-transparent backdrop-blur-md px-8 py-4 text-lg

proof_bar.style: Minimalist ticker or fixed grid at the bottom of hero. Text in #A7B0BA, border-y border-[#F8FAFC]/10.
proof_bar.content: Real credentials. No fake metrics. E.g., 'Baseline Vision Certified', 'Pro Tour Experience', 'Video Analytics'

service_cards.style: Tactical Neumorphism / Technical Grid. bg-[#0B1F33], 1px border-[#F8FAFC]/10. Hover: -translate-y-1, border-[#B7FF00]/50, subtle glow.
service_cards.title: Anton font, #F8FAFC

baseline_vision_section.style: Control Room Grid. Display stats, data points, or abstract analysis graphics. Dense typography, glowing #B7FF00 accents for data bars.

navigation.style: Crystal Glass or Solid. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#06141F]/80, border-b border-[#F8FAFC]/10. Must contain EN/TR language toggle.
navigation.links: Home, Baseline Vision, Coaching, Pathways, About Ali, Contact

video_placeholders.style: aspect-video bg-[#0B1F33] border border-[#F8FAFC]/10 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden group
video_placeholders.icon: Play icon in #B7FF00, scales up on hover

contact_cta.style: Massive typography, high contrast. bg-[#B7FF00] container with #06141F text, or vice versa with neon borders.

motion.hover: Fast, precise, athletic transitions. transition-all duration-200 ease-out.
motion.reveal: Staggered fade-up for service cards and grid items. No bouncy springs; use sharp ease-out curves.
motion.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero background to add depth without distraction.

image_urls.description: Overhead view of green tennis court. Use for hero background or Baseline Vision section.
Dark studio portrait of a tennis player/coach holding a racket. Use for 'About Ali' section.
Tennis player silhouette against vivid sky. Great for 'Australia-Türkiye Pathways' or 'Tournament Development'.
Close-up of athlete's legs on clay court. Use for 'Coaching' or 'Tennis Pro Analysis' section.

media.video: Use empty states with dark navy background and play icon for video placeholders as requested.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No light blue.
Implement Anton for headings, making sure they are uppercase and visually commanding.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures to avoid generic Shadcn card stiffness. Only use Shadcn for complex interactives.
Ensure the hero image has a #06141F/60 overlay for text contrast.
Do not invent fake numbers or testimonials. Stick to structural placeholders if content is missing.
Include the EN/TR language toggle in the header.
Make sure all headings use Anton and all body text uses Inter.
